reviews.review_description:
Little desert area with quality graphical elements and 1 quick story element.  Can be finished in 2 min. 

Reminds me of dream dimension. If the dev added a story and some goals and another 5 areas it could be a popular $5 title.

As a first time trial experience by a developer Id say this is very good.

Graphics and environment are well done here! But it's SO short that it's hard to justify paying money. Also, the option to use freeform movement instead of teleport would gain another star. Hate to give a lower rating to anything that's well executed for Gear VR but tough to pay for this. If it was free, 5 stars.
Hey devs can you make this a longer game by any chance? including adding more titans, characters and environments?
Graphics are ok but way too short
